message:
chore(audit): batch 405 — kafka.rs + class.rs + capability/* SOUND (~4,201 lines)

Complete messaging module audit coverage this session:
- kafka.rs (1588L): rdkafka wrapper, delivery channel, cancel-safety
- class.rs (495L): delivery classes, cost vectors, policy validation
- capability/mod.rs (604L): capability registry, fail-closed checks
- capability/tokens.rs (718L): linear tokens, session advance
- capability/routing.rs (796L): routing programs, subject rewriting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
